name: SecurityPolicy5G
description: SecurityPolicy5G schema from Palo Alto Networks SASE 5G Managed Services API

policy_id.description: Unique identifier of the security policy.

name.description: Display name of the security policy.

threat_prevention.description: Whether threat prevention inspection is enabled.

url_filtering.description: Whether URL filtering is enabled for 5G data traffic.

log_forwarding.description: Whether log forwarding is enabled for this policy.
